title: ctenitis dingnanensis
intro: Ctenitis dingnanensis, also known as Dingnan's ctenitis, is a species of fern belonging to the family Dryopteridaceae, native to Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Ctenitis dingnanensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and support the immune system, as well as its ability to protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. In traditional herbal medicine, Ctenitis dingnanensis is prepared into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
